# Third-party notices

SparkPipe includes the following vendored third-party source trees.

## FlashInfer

Path: `third_party/flashinfer`

Source supplied by user as `flashinfer-main.zip`.

License: Apache License 2.0.

Attribution retained:

```text
FlashInfer: Kernel Library for LLM Serving
Copyright and license notices are preserved in:
  third_party/flashinfer/LICENSE
  third_party/flashinfer/NOTICE
  third_party/flashinfer/licenses/
```

Files adapted from FlashInfer must keep the Apache-2.0 notice and identify the upstream path they were derived from.

## DeepSpec / DSpark

Path: `third_party/deepspec`

Source supplied by user as `DeepSpec-main.zip`.

License: MIT.

Attribution retained:

```text
DeepSpec
Copyright (c) 2026 The DeepSpec Authors
License and notice are preserved in:
  third_party/deepspec/LICENSE
  third_party/deepspec/NOTICE
```

Files adapted from DeepSpec must keep the MIT notice and identify the upstream path they were derived from.
